The overall average of Profit is **$147,045**. The supplier "**ACS Innovations**" has the most significant impact on the increase of the overall average of Profit, as it increases the overall average by **+14.6%**, and when excluding this supplier, the overall average of Profit decreases from **$147,045** to **$125,508**. On the other hand, the supplier "**Columbia House**" has a large impact on the decrease of the overall average of Profit, as it decreases the overall average by **-2.7%**, and when excluding this supplier, the overall average of Profit increases from **$147,045** to **$150,979**.
